faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Seaford?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Seaford typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method chosen. We offer free inspections to provide an accurate quote for your specific situation and can often provide same-day service for urgent cases.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Seaford homes?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and EPA-approved chemical treatments for Seaford residents. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to 135°F+ to kill bed bugs at all life stages in a single day, while chemical treatments involve targeted applications over multiple visits. Our experts will recommend the best approach based on your home's layout and infestation severity.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Seaford?
faqs.answer: Heat treatment typically takes 6-8 hours and eliminates bed bugs in one day, while chemical treatments require 2-3 visits spaced two weeks apart. After treatment, we provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination. Most Seaford homes are completely bed bug-free within 2-4 weeks depending on the treatment method selected.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Seaford home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatment, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures throughout your home. For chemical treatments, you should plan to be away for 4-6 hours after application. We provide detailed preparation instructions, and our team works efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine in Seaford.
